title: hyoscyamus niger subsp. agrestis
intro: Hyoscyamus niger subsp. agrestis, also known as wild henbane, is a subspecies of the Hyoscyamus niger plant, a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, sedative, and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hyoscyamus niger subsp. agrestis include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and pain, as well as potential uses in treating respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of wild henbane can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, although it is essential to exercise caution and consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
